creator: terescoj@gmail.com
text:
Hyperlatex produces unusable HTML output (special characters) when used with emacs 23.

Fix: 

Deinstalling the emacs port (23.1) and installing emacs22 (22.3.1) solved the problem.
How-To-Repeat: Install the latest print/hyperlatex and editors/emacs ports and try to generate an html document from latex source using hyperlatex.  The HTML output produced contains special characters that cause browsers to be unable to render the document.
